info.title: AI Governance - AI Governance
info.description: The AI Governance APIs are used to integrate external systems and streamline the flow of data with AI Governance in the OneTrust Platform.

hostname.description: The OneTrust hostname such as app.onetrust.com, app-eu.onetrust.com, app-de.onetrust.com, app-uk.onetrust.com, app-apac.onetrust.com, trial.onetrust.com, or uat.onetrust.com.

tags.name: Attribute Management
tags.description: The Attribute Management APIs are used to manage attributes associated with AI Governance entities.

tags.name: Entity Management
tags.description: The Entity Management APIs are used to manage AI Governance entities.

tags.name: Entity Type Management
tags.description: The Entity Type Management APIs are used to manage AI Governance entity types.

tags.name: Entity Workflow Management
tags.description: The Entity Workflow Management APIs are used to manage AI Governance entity workflows.

tags.name: Relationship Management
tags.description: The Relationship Management APIs are used to manage relationships between AI Governance entities.

tags.name: Task Management
tags.description: The Task Management APIs are used to manage tasks associated with AI Governance entities.

post.description:
Use this API to update the workflow stage for the specified entity record.

> 🗒 Things to Know
> 
> - This API only supports AI Governance entities (Models, Datasets, AI Systems, and AI Agents).
> - AI Governance APIs will become available over the course of the Spring as customer tenants are upgraded to enhanced AI Governance services. No customer action is required and more detailed information will be published in upcoming release notes and product documentation.

parameters.description: Identifier of the entity

schema.description: Identifier of the entity

parameters.description: Workflow Type

schema.description: Workflow type Name

get.description:
Use this API to retrieve a single entity record by its unique identifier along with the associated attributes, module name, and created date.

> - AI Governance APIs will become available over the course of the Spring as customer tenants are upgraded to enhanced AI Governance services. No customer action is required and more detailed information will be published in upcoming release notes and product documentation.

> - AI Governance APIs will become available over the course of the Spring as customer tenants are upgraded to enhanced AI Governance services. No customer action is required and more detailed information will be published in upcoming release notes and product documentation.

get.description:
Use this API to retrieve a specific task on an entity. The response will include details such as the activity history, assignee, and deadline.

> 🗒 Things to Know
> 
> - This API only supports AI Governance entities (Models, Datasets, AI Systems, and AI Agents).
> - AI Governance APIs will become available over the course of the Spring as customer tenants are upgraded to enhanced AI Governance services. No customer action is required and more detailed information will be published in upcoming release notes and product documentation.

parameters.description: Dynamic key-value parameters for task context

description.example: Please review the attached document and provide feedback

isRequired.description: Flag indicating if the task is required

sourceType.description: Type of source that created the task

sourceId.description: ID of the source that created the task

example.description: Please review the attached document and provide feedback

valueKey.description: Key or identifier for the attribute value

value.description: The display value of the attribute

color.description: Color code for displaying the due date

icon.description: Icon identifier for the due date status

textKey.description: Translation key for text to display with the due date

numberOfDays.description: Number of days until or past the due date

userInfo.description: Detailed information about the assigned user

assigneeId.description: Unique identifier of the assignee (user or group)

type.description: Type of the assignee (user or group)

isCollaborator.description: Indicates if this assignment is as a collaborator or primary assignee

id.description: Unique identifier for the task

description.example: This task requires reviewing document X and providing feedback

orgGroupId.description: Organization group identifier associated with the task (deprecated)

isActive.description: Indicates if the task is active

sourceType.description: The source type that created the task

sourceId.description: ID of the source that created the task

taskAssignmentInformations.description: List of assignment information for the task

presentationMode.description: The presentation mode for the task

isCollaboratorSupported.description: Indicates if collaborators are supported for this task

isCollaboratorGroupSupported.description: Indicates if collaborator groups are supported for this task

relativeUrl.description: Relative URL associated with the task

workflowAndStageBasicInformation.description: Basic information about workflow and current stage

workflowId.description: ID of the workflow associated with the task

workflowStageId.description: ID of the workflow stage associated with the task

stageName.description: Name of the current workflow stage

stageNameKey.description: Translation key for the stage name

badgeColor.description: Color of the badge for the current stage

dueDateInfo.description: Information about the due date including formatting details

permissionsMetadata.description: Metadata about permissions for this task

createdBy.description: ID of the user who created the task (deprecated)

createdByAttribute.description: Information about the user who created the task

createdDT.description: Date and time when the task was created

modifiedBy.description: ID of the user who last modified the task (deprecated)

modifiedByAttribute.description: Information about the user who last modified the task

modifiedDT.description: Date and time when the task was last modified

completionDate.description: Date and time when the task was completed

isRequired.description: Indicates if the task is required

canEditRequiredTask.description: Indicates if a required task can be edited

example.description: This task requires reviewing document X and providing feedback

nameKey.description: Translation key for the task type name

module.description: Module that this task type belongs to

moduleNameTranslationKey.description: Translation key for the module name

id.description: Unique identifier for the task type

label.description: Display label for the task type

icon.description: Icon identifier for the task type

nameWithAttributes.description: The user's name with additional attributes

policyStatus.description: Policy status of the linked assignment

id.description: Associated Attribute GUID

description.example: Provide details about count associated with this attribute

mappedFieldName.description: Mapped Attribute field name. Should be used for sorting

id.description: Override Option GUID

enabled.description: Indicates if the option is enabled or disabled

metadata.description: Additional metadata for the attribute option

id.description: Attribute GUID

nameKey.description: Attribute name key which can be used for translation

description.example: Gather Type for the record - provide some value related to nature of record

descriptionKey.description: Attribute description key which can be used for translation

fieldName.description: Attribute field name which can be used for uniquely identifying an attribute

mappedFieldName.description: Mapped Attribute field name. Should be used for sorting

encrypted.description: Indicate whether to encrypt the field value or not. Only supported for text, single select and multi select

allowOther.description: Indicator for allowing user defined options for attribute

baseAttribute.description: Indicate if attribute is part of extendable entity and which cannot be modified

optionAllowed.description: Indicate if attribute can have static options or not

entity2.description: Associated Entity Instance for given Entity Type

detailsAccessRestricted.description: Flag indicating whether entity is view-only

The unique identifier of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

initials.description: The initials for the first and last name of the user.

createdDate.description: The date and time that the entity was last created.

lastUpdatedDate.description: The date and time that the entity was last updated.

createdBy.description: The information of the user who last created/modified the entity.

lastModifiedBy.description: The information of the user who last created/modified the entity.

id.description: Unique Identifier of an Link Type
Unique identifier of the link record. Auto-generated when a new link is created.

linkType.description: Link type information defining the type of relationship. Can be specified by ID or name.

linkTypeLabel.description: Link type label information showing the directional relationship names between the two entities.

entity1.description: Source entity information for this relationship. Contains entity identifier and type details.

entity2.description: Target entity information for this relationship. Contains entity identifier and type details.

schemaId.description: Unique identifier of the schema used for this link type.

auditFields.description: Audit information for the link including creation and modification details. Contains information about when the link was created/modified and by whom.

field.description: The field name used to filter results.

operator.description: The relationship that must be met between the field and value.

value.description:
The field value used to filter results. If filtering for a range of values, this would be the start of the range and should be used in conjunction with the `toValue` parameter. 
Examples by type: UUID = 'e68d49c4-f11f-4cd9-8f1b-0be8ef945b8f', LocalDate = '2023-01-01', OffsetDateTime = '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z', String = 'Closed', Number = 7

toValue.description:
The field value for the end of the range. This field should be used in conjunction with the `value` parameter. 
Examples by type: LocalDate = '2023-01-01', OffsetDateTime = '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z', String = 'Closed', Number = 7

filters.description: The fields and values used to filter results.

fullText.description: The key terms for the search criteria.

criteria.description: The criteria used to search for entities, including filters, full-text search, and sorting

organizationTraversalStrategy.description: The strategy for fetching entities across related organizations. Default: null (no organization traversal applicable)

requestedOrganizationId.description: The overridden requested organization identifier. If supplied, would be used instead of request context organization

queryAction.description: The query action specifies the source of the API call and allows a service to apply a predicate

id.description: Unique Identifier of an Entity Attribute

attributes.description: Custom attributes for the link based on the link type schema. Contains attribute paths mapped to their values.

entity1.description: The first entity in the relationship (source entity). Contains entity identifier and type details.

entity2.description: The second entity in the relationship (target entity). Contains entity identifier and type details.

entityLinkTypeId.description: Unique identifier of the link type that defines the relationship. Required if sourceSystemGenerator is not provided.

sourceSystemGenerator.description: Identifier of the system that generates this link. Required if entityLinkTypeId is not provided.

linkTypeLabel.description: Display name for the relationship direction. Used for showing the relationship in UI.

name.description: The name of the entity. Required field used as the primary identifier for users.

organization.description: The organization group that owns this entity. Contains organization ID and optional name.

attributes.description: The custom attributes for the entity defined by its schema. Contains attribute paths mapped to their values.

workflowAndStage.description: Requested workflow and stage to be assigned to the entity during creation. Contains workflow and stage identifiers.

entityLinks.description: Entity link requests to create relationships with other entities during entity creation

id.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

workflow.description: Workflow to be assigned to the entity. The entity type must have this workflow type defined in its settings.

stage.description: Workflow stage to be assigned to the entity within the specified workflow. Must be a valid stage for the given workflow.

closedDate.description: Date when the entity was closed. Only relevant for workflows with closed stages.

id.description: The unique identifier of the entity. Auto-generated when a new entity is created.

number.description: The numerical order in which the entity was created. Used for reference and sorting.

name.description: The name of the entity. Used as the primary identifier for users.

orgGroupId.description: The unique identifier of the organization that owns this entity.

schemaId.description: The unique identifier of the schema that defines the structure of this entity.

entityType.description: The parameters that detail the type of entity, including type ID, name and other type-specific information.

workflowAndStage.description: The parameters that detail the workflow and stage information, including current workflow state and stage details.

attributes.description: The custom attributes of the entity defined by the entity type schema. Contains attribute paths and corresponding values. The number of attributes can vary based on the entity type definition.

auditFields.description: The parameters that provide audit history for the entity, including creation and modification details.

id.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

workflowMode.description: This parameter indicates whether the workflow mode is null, basic, or advanced.

stageId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow stage.

stageName.description: The name of the workflow stage.

mode.description: The mode based on which required non-base fields would be selected.

includeSelectedFullTextSearchFields.description: The full text search mode would only includes passed "fields" of Text/Date/NumericalText/DateTime response type.

overriddenSearchFields.description: The caller can override search (system) fields which need to included.

context.description: User-defined context for the current request

queryRequest.description: Query request containing search criteria and organization context

requestedFields.description: Field request specifying which fields to include in the response

nextStageName.description: Name of the next stage to navigate to

parameters.description: Additional parameters for workflow navigation customization

id.description: Advance Stage Action Identifier

workflowExceptionApprovalRequiredFromAll.description: Is exception required from all approvers

id.description: Workflow Stage Approver Identifier

approverUserId.description: Workflow Stage Approver User Id, User ID from Onetrust System

referenceApproverUserSourceId.description: Reference identifier for approver' source. ie, fieldName from attribute Manager

referenceApproverUserSourceOwner.description: Reference Source Owner. ie, schemaname from attribute manager

approverUserGroupId.description: Workflow Stage Approver User Group Id, User Group ID from Onetrust System

approverCategory.description: Field to indicate if the approver is for stage approval or exception

id.description: Workflow Stage Identifier

nameKey.description: Workflow Stage Name Key for translation purposes

descriptionKey.description: Workflow Stage Description Key for translation purposes

allowDeletion.description: Indicates if Workflow Stage can be deleted

badgeColor.description: Workflow Stage Badge Color for UI purposes

approvalStage.description: Indicates if the stage is an approval stage

exceptionStage.description: Indicates if the stage is an exception approval stage

autoAdvanceOnApproval.description: Can Workflow Stage Auto-Advance on Approval?

additionalFields.description: Additional fields associated with Workflow Stage

advanceStageActionEnabled.description: Does Workflow Stage has advance stage action enabled?

name.description: The updated name of the entity. If not provided, the existing name will be retained.

organization.description: The updated organization group for the entity. Contains organization ID and optional name. If not provided, the existing organization will be retained.

attributes.description: Custom attributes to update on the entity. Only the attributes provided will be updated; others will retain their existing values.
